children.text: in the case of refined sugar, 34 cents per hundredweight per month; and
in the case of raw cane sugar, 27 cents per hundredweight per month.

children.heading: Prior crop years
children.label: b Prior crop years
children.text: For each of the 2012 through 2024 crop years, the Commodity Credit Corporation shall establish rates for the storage of forfeited sugar in the same manner as was used on the day before the date of enactment of this section.
